title: Claude Code Agent Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for Claude Code agent skill file frontmatter

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's role and capabilities

tools.description: System execution tools available to this agent

model.description: Preferred model to use when running this agent

quality_level.description: Quality enforcement level for this file (0-3)

context.description: Execution context for the agent (e.g. fork)

agent.description: Agent mode or name to delegate to

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the agent
